div.head: 位置
div.p: 95-1號窟位於H區最西邊，方位爲204°，距崖脚5.2米左右，與東側95-2號窟相距0.8米左右，窟底比95-2號窟窟底高0.7米左右（）。該窟於2012年首次編號。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 小型敞口横長方形窟，製作較粗糙。可能用作瘞窟（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 窟底堆滿泥土，并長出植物。

div.head: 位置
div.p: 95-2號窟位於H區，方位爲204°。與崖脚相距4.5米左右，在一突起崖壁處的西邊；距西側95-1號窟0.8米左右，窟底低於95-1號窟窟底0.7米左右，距東側95-3號窟27米左右（）。該窟於2012年首次編號。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟，製作較粗糙，窟頂向東傾斜（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 尚佳。

figure.head: 95-1號窟（左）和95-2號窟（右）的位置。2024年拍攝
Spatial relation between Caves 95-1 (left) and 95-2 (right); photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 95-3號窟位於H區，方位原本與95-2號窟大致相同。與西側95-2號窟相距27米左右。該窟於2012年首次編號。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形窟，未完工。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 此窟隨所附岩石從崖壁脱落，倒置於谷底，窟口面向山體（）。當地年長者亦不知此窟於何時坍塌。

figure.head: 95-3號窟坍塌滚落後窟底朝上的情况。2012年拍攝
Cave 95-3 lying upside down after the collapse and roll; photograph taken in 2012

div.head: 位置
div.p: 95號窟位於H區，面向西南偏南。原位於水平綫上7米左右、95-3號窟東側25.5米左右處。窟底高出相鄰96號窟窟底1米左右（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟。窟口有兩塊垂直平板，用於遮掩和擋風（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 2019年6月9日凌晨三點，本窟與96號窟和97號窟一同坍塌（），僅剩兩壁和窟頂傾倒於地面（）。

figure.head: 95－97號窟的位置。2007年拍攝
Spatial relation of Caves 95−97; photograph taken in 2007

div.head: 位置
div.p: 96號窟位於H區，面向西南偏南。原本位於崖脚水平綫上6米左右，與東側97號窟相距3.9米左右。窟底低於95號窟窟底1米左右。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 2019年6月9日凌晨三點，該窟與95號窟、97號窟一同坍塌（）。

figure.head: 95號窟（左）和96號窟（右）2019年坍塌之後的現狀。2024年拍攝
Caves 95 (left) and 96 (right) after the collapse in 2019; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 97號窟位於H區，面向西南偏南。原本位於96號窟東側3.9米左右處、自98號窟開始的8個排成一列的洞窟西側。因難以抵達窟口，而無法詳細測量。此窟或許因其高度難以施工而放弃（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 以窟口輪廓判斷，原本計劃開鑿方形敞口窟，并采用標準尺寸（ ）。

div.head: 尺寸
div.p: 窟口距地面過高，難以企及，未做測量。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 2019年6月9日凌晨三點，本窟與95號窟、96號窟一同坍塌（）。

figure.head: 97號窟（左）和98號窟（右）的位置。2010年拍攝
Spatial relation between Caves 97 (left) and 98 (right); photograph taken in 2010

div.head: 位置
div.p: 98號窟位於H區，面向西南偏南，方位爲150°。與西南側的97號窟相距2米左右；與東北側的99號窟相距1.7米左右。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 窟口部分和95－97號窟於2019年6月9日凌晨三點一同坍塌（）。

figure.head: 98號窟坍塌之後的窟口現狀。2024年拍攝
Cave 98 after the collapse of the entrance; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 99號窟位於H區，方位爲135°。距西南側的98號窟1.7米左右，窟底高出98號窟窟底0.14米；距東北側的100號窟1.27米左右，窟底低於100號窟窟底0.65米（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 尚佳。

figure.head: 99號窟（左）和100號窟（右）的位置。2010年拍攝
Spatial relation between Caves 99 (left) and 100 (right); photograph taken in 2010

div.head: 位置
div.p: 100號窟位於H區，方位爲130°。與西南側的99號窟相距1.27米左右；與東北側的101號窟相距5米左右，窟底低於101號窟窟底1.5米左右。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 尚佳。

div.head: 位置
div.p: 101號窟位於H區，方位爲124°。與西南側的100號窟相距5米左右，窟底高出100號窟窟底1.5米左右；與東北側的102號窟相距2.2米左右，窟底低於102號窟窟底1.5米左右（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 尚佳。

figure.head: 101號窟（左）和102號窟（右）的位置。2024年拍攝
Spatial relation between Caves 101 (left) and 102 (right); photograph taken in 2024
102號窟全景。2010年拍攝
Overview of Cave 102; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: 位置
div.p: 102號窟位於H區，方位爲114°。與西南側的101號窟相距2.2米左右，窟底高出101號窟窟底1.5米左右（）；與東北側的103號窟相距9.2米左右，窟底低於103號窟窟底1米左右。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟（ ）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 尚佳。

div.head: 位置
div.p: 103號窟位於H區，方位爲112°。與西南側的102號窟相距9.2米左右，窟底高出102號窟窟底1米左右；與東北側的104號窟相距2.1米左右，兩窟窟底高度齊平。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 尚佳。

div.head: 位置
div.p: 104號窟位於H區，方位爲115°。距西南側的103號窟2.1米左右，距東北側的104-1號窟2米左右，窟底與103號窟、104-1號窟窟底高度齊平（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 窟口上方破損。

figure.head: 103號窟、104號窟和104-1號窟（自左往右）的位置。2024年拍攝
Spatial relation of Caves 103, 104, and 104-1 (from left to right); photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 104-1號窟位於H區，方位爲122°。與西南側的104號窟相距2米，窟底與104號窟窟底高度齊平。與東北側的104-2號窟相距45.8米左右，爲平滑陡峭的岩石所間隔（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟，窟口坍塌（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 窟口上方坍塌。

figure.head: 104-1號窟全景。2010年拍攝
Overview of Cave 104-1; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: 位置
div.p: 104-2號窟位於H區，方位爲122°。與西南側的104-1號窟相距45.8米左右，中間間隔平滑陡峭的岩石，無法直達（）；與東北側的104-3號窟爲雙窟，相距0.7米左右，窟底與104-3號窟窟底高度齊平。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟，坍塌一半左右（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 前半部分坍塌。

figure.head: 104-2號窟全景。2024年拍攝
Overview of Cave 104-2; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 104-3號窟位於H區，方位爲122°。與西南側的104-2號窟爲雙窟，相距0.7米左右，窟底與104-2號窟窟底高度齊平；與東北側的105號窟相距2.85米左右，窟底高出105號窟窟底0.46米左右。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟，坍塌過半（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 前半部分坍塌。

figure.head: 104-3號窟全景。2024年拍攝
Overview of Cave 104-3; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 105號窟位於H區，方位爲128°。與西南側的104-3號窟相距2.85米左右，窟底低於104-3號窟窟底0.46米左右；與東北側的106號窟相距47.5米左右，窟底低於106號窟窟底2米左右，兩窟爲巨石所隔開，無法直達。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 原本計劃開鑿方形敞口平頂窟，但開鑿底部之後即放弃（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 未完工。

figure.head: 105號窟已開鑿部分。2024年拍攝
The part already hewn in Cave 105; photograph taken in 2024
105號窟（左）和106號窟（右）之間的巨石。2024年拍攝
Rocks between Caves 105 (left) and 106 (right); photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 106號窟位於H區，與其他洞窟相對隔離。與西南側的105號窟相距5米左右，窟底高出105號窟窟底2米左右，兩窟之間有巨石相隔；可通過距交界處5米遠的一條小路繞過岩石到達（）。此岩石與東北側的106-1號窟相距2米左右，兩窟高度齊平。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 小型方形敞口窟（）。

list.item: 正壁：上寬150厘米，下寬180厘米。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 窟口些許損毁。

figure.head: 106號窟。2024年拍攝
Cave 106; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 106-1號窟位於H區。與西南側的106號窟相距2米左右，兩窟高度齊平；與東北側的107號窟相距39.2米。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 本窟窟形呈不規則狀。最初開鑿時可能因岩石品質不佳而停工（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 未完工。

figure.head: 106號窟（左）和106-1號窟（右）。2024年拍攝
Caves 106 (left) and 106-1 (right); photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 107號窟位於H區“丁家岩”段，方位爲145°。與西南側106-1號窟相距39.2米，與東北側108號窟相距1.65米，窟底高出108號窟窟底0.5米左右。距崖脚5.7米左右，距水平綫13米左右（和），距泊船處270米左右（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟。墻壁有刮鑿痕迹，但未精細打磨。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 窟口毁損。

div.head: 位置
div.p: 108號窟位於H區“丁家岩”段，方位爲145°。與西南側的107號窟相距1.65米左右，與東北側的109號刻經窟相距0.68米左右。高出崖脚3.20－5米左右，高出水平綫13米左右（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟。墻壁有刮鑿痕迹，但未精細打磨（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: d壁和f壁上裂痕頗深，造成窟底前端呈新月形斷痕。

div.head: 位置
div.p: 111號窟位於H區“丁家岩”段，方位爲145°。與西南側的110號刻經窟相距7.25米左右（），與東北側的112號窟相距1.5米左右，窟底低於112號窟窟底1.7米左右。111號窟因與112號窟和113號窟距離較近，形成了一組三聯窟（）。高出崖脚1.5米左右，高出水平面13米左右。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟。f壁可見雙層窟口（ ）。壁面的鑿痕相當規整（），但未精細打磨。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 尚佳。

figure.head: 111號窟d壁上規整的鑿痕。2024年拍攝
Systematical striations on wall d, Cave 111; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 112號窟位於H區“丁家岩”段，方位爲145°。與西南側的111號窟相距1.5米左右，是111－113號三聯窟組合的中窟（）。窟底高出111號窟窟底1.7米左右，高出崖脚2米左右，高出水平綫14米左右。

figure.head: 111－113號窟三聯窟組合的位置。2024年拍攝
Spatial relation of the triple Caves 111−113; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟，雙層窟口。墻壁上有2厘米左右寬的刮痕，未經精細打磨。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 尚佳。

div.head: 位置
div.p: 113號窟位於H區“丁家岩”段，方位爲145°。與西南側的112號窟相距2米左右，是111－113號窟三聯窟組合的最北窟（）。窟底低於112號窟窟底1.4米左右，高出崖脚1.3米左右，高出水平綫12米左右。與東北側的114號窟相距34.7米左右。

figure.head: 113號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 113, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟，雙層窟口。墻壁有2厘米左右寬的粗糙刮痕，未經精細打磨（和）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 尚佳。

figure.head: 114號窟地貌。2024年拍攝
The environment of Cave 114; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 114號窟位於H區“丁家岩”段（），方位爲145°。與其他窟龕相距較遠，與西南側的113號窟相距34.7米左右，與東北方向的115號窟相距42.8米左右。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 雙層窟口，外層呈長方形，内層上方呈圓拱形。（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 龕内僅存兩尊未完工雕像的坯形（）。

figure.head: 114號窟近景。2024年拍攝
Cave 114, close-up view; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 115號窟位於H區，方位爲145°。與西南側的114號窟相距約42.8米，與東北側的115-1號窟相距約22米，窟底低於115-1號窟窟底約5米。位處較隱密處，不易抵達（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 窟底呈梯形；窟頂前高後低，有瓦棱結構（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 窟頂前端坍塌。e壁全部和d壁、f壁的後部有粗糙的刮痕。d壁和f壁前端刮痕較精細，但未打磨。窟外西側有一塊可能用於刊刻題記的打磨區，尺寸爲55厘米×47厘米（）。

figure.head: 115號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 115, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: 位置
div.p: 115-1號窟位於H區，方位爲160°。與西南側的115號窟相距22米左右，窟底高出115號窟窟底5米左右；與東北側的116號窟相距29.3米左右，高出116號窟窟底8米左右。洞窟西壁外崖面上有一打磨區，可能用於刊刻題記（）。2024年該窟首次編號。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 此窟d壁與靠此壁的窟頂因爲采石而毁（）。

figure.head: 部分因采石而毁的 115-1號窟。2024年拍攝
Cave 115-1, partly destroyed by quarrying; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: 位置
div.p: 116號窟位於H區“菩薩岩”段，方位爲167°。與西南側的115-1號窟相距29.3米左右，窟底低於115-1號窟窟底8米左右；與東北側的117號窟相距0.8米左右，窟底低於117號窟窟底1.2米左右。與117－118號窟相距較近，從而形成三聯窟組合（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟。雙層窟門（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 可能原本作刻經窟，但三面墻壁皆無經文，後來改爲造像窟。e壁雕三身佛，f壁爲浮雕佛塔（116-3號，），d壁爲圓拱龕，并有一則南宋紹興二年題記（116-2號，）。題記録文見本卷。

figure.head: 116號窟正壁三身佛造像與f壁七級佛塔。2007年拍攝
Cave 116, three Buddha statues on wall e and a seven-storied pagoda on wall f; photograph taken in 2007
116號窟（左）和117號窟（右）的位置。2010年拍攝
Spatial relation between Caves 116 (left) and 117 (right); photograph taken in 2010

div.head: 位置
div.p: 117號窟位於H區“菩薩岩”段，方位爲175°。與西南側的116號窟相距0.8米左右，窟底高出116號窟窟底1.2米左右；與東北側的118號窟相距0.54米左右，窟底高出118號窟窟底1.2米左右。本窟是116－118號三聯窟組合的中窟（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟，采用的尺寸僅爲標準尺寸的一半。雙層窟門。
窟底呈方形。窟頂平坦，後部略低（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 墻壁均有粗糙的刮痕和苔蘚。

div.head: 位置
div.p: 118號窟位於H區“菩薩岩”段，方位爲167°。與西南側的117號窟相距0.54米左右，窟底低於117號窟窟底1.2米左右；與東北側的119號窟相距4米左右，窟底低於119號窟窟底1.3米左右。本窟是116－118號三聯窟組合的北窟（）。高出水平綫3米左右。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟。西側有雙層窟門痕迹，窟頂平坦（）。

list.item: e壁：上寬230厘米，下寬256厘米，高168－175厘米。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: e壁爲後刻雙菩薩像，今殘（）。打磨區用於刊刻題記，今已無法辨識。

figure.head: 118號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 118, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: 位置
div.p: 119號窟位於H區“菩薩岩”段，方位爲175°。與西南側的118號窟相距4米左右，窟底高出118號窟窟底1.3米左右（）；與東北側的120號窟相距2米左右，窟底高出120號窟窟底1.5米左右。高出水平綫4.3米左右（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟。東側有雙層窟門。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 前端坍塌。e壁有像龕，三級臺座上鎸雕佛教（西側）和道教（東側）造像（）。d壁上有灰身龕、燈龕與一則題記（和）。

figure.head: 116－119號窟（從左自右）的位置。2024年拍攝
Spatial relation of Caves 116–119 (from left to right); photograph taken in 2024
119號窟（左）和120號窟（右）的位置。2010年拍攝
Spatial relation between Caves 119 (left) and 120 (right); photograph taken in 2010

div.head: 位置
div.p: 120號窟位於H區“菩薩岩”段，d壁方位192°。距西南側119號窟2米左右，窟底低於119號窟窟底1.5米左右；距東北側的121號窟0.8米左右，窟底低於121號窟窟底0.3米左右（）。高出水平綫3米左右。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟。雙層窟口今已無法辨識。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: d壁損毁，f壁前端斷裂，e壁相對保存完好，并帶有規則的刮痕。

figure.head: 120號窟（左）和121號窟（右）的位置。2010年拍攝
Spatial relation between Caves 120 (left) and 121 (right); photograph taken in 2010

div.head: 位置
div.p: 121號窟位於H區“菩薩岩”段，方位爲195°。與西南側的120號窟相距0.8米左右，窟底高出120號窟窟底0.3米左右；與東北側的122號窟相距0.9米左右，窟底低於122號窟窟底0.4米左右（）。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 方形敞口平頂窟（）。

div.head: 尺寸
div.p: 窟口：195厘米×212厘米。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 未完工。

figure.head: 121號窟。2010年拍攝
Cave 121; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: 位置
div.p: 122號窟位於H區“菩薩岩”段。方位爲195°。與西南側的121號窟相距0.9米左右，窟底高出121號窟窟底0.4米左右。122號窟是卧佛院最後一個洞窟。

div.head: 形制
div.p: 小型方形敞口平頂窟。雙層窟門，窟頂後傾（）。

div.head: 保存狀况
div.p: 未完工。窟底大部坍裂，三面窟壁上均有粗糙刮痕。

figure.head: 122號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 122, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Westernmost cave in section H, direction 204°, ca. 5.2 m above the foot of the cliff; 0.8 m to the west of cave 95-2. The floor is about 0.7 m higher than that of Cave 95-2 (fig. ). The number of this cave is first given in 2012.

figure.head: 95-1號窟近景。2012年拍攝
Cave 95-1, close-up view; photograph taken in 2012

div.head: Shape
div.p: Horizontal rectangular box with open front, small size; roughly executed, probably used as burial cave (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Full of earth and plants.

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, direction 204°, ca. 4.5 m above the foot of the cliff; to the west of a bulge in the cliff, 0.8 m east to the Cave 95-1. The floor is about 0.7 m lower than that of the latter (fig. ), 27 m to the west of Cave 95-3; The number of this cave is first given in 2012.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, roughly executed, ceiling slanting towards the east (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Fairly good.

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, original direction similar with 95-2; ca. 27 m to the east of Cave 95-2. The number of this cave is first given in 2012.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box, unfinished.

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: The rock with the cave in it fell down from the cliff and is now lying upside down in the valley; the opening of the cave faces towards the mountain (fig. ); even the oldest local people do not know when this took place.

figure.head: 95-2號窟近景。2012年拍攝
Cave 95-2, close-up view; photograph taken in 2012

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, facing south-southwest, originally ca. 7 m above the water level at the foot of the cliff, ca. 25.5 m to the east of Cave 95-3; the floor lies ca. 1 m higher than the floor of the neighboring Cave 96 (fig. ).

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, two vertical slabs providing privacy and wind protection at the front side (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Crashed, together with Caves 96 and 97, on June 9, 2019, at 3 am (fig. ). Only two walls and the ceiling lay on the ground after the collapse (fig. ).

figure.head: 95號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 95, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010
95號窟坍塌之後的現狀,局部。2024年拍攝
Cave 95 after the collapse, detail; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, facing south-southwest, originally ca. 6 m above the water level at the foot of the cliff, ca. 3.9 m west of Cave 97; the floor lies ca. 1 m lower than the floor of the neighboring Cave 95.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, standard size (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Crashed, together with Caves 95 and 97, on June 9, 2019, at 3 am (fig. ).

figure.head: 96號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 96, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, facing south-southwest; ca. 3.9 m to the east of Cave 96; to the west of the 8 caves in a row, beginning with Cave 98; not examined in detail, as the entrance is difficult to access. The cave has been abandoned probably due to construction issue that caused by its heigt (fig. ).

div.head: Shape
Measurements
div.p: Not examined in detail, as the entrance is too high to access.

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Together with Caves 95 and 96, Cave 97 crashed on June 9, 2019, at 3 am (fig. ).

figure.head: 98號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 98, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, facing south-southwest, direction 150˚; ca. 2 m to the north-east of Cave 97, ca. 1.7 m to the south-west of Cave 99.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, standard size (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Together with Caves 95–97, the entrance crashed on June 9, 2019, at 3 am (fig. ).

div.head: Location
Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, standard size (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Fairly good.

figure.head: 99號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 99, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, direction 130˚; ca. 1.27 m to the north-east of Cave 99, ca. 5 m to the south-west of Cave 101, floor ca. 1.5 m lower than that of Cave 101.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, standard size (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Fairly good.

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, direction 124˚; ca. 5 m to the north-east of Cave 100, floor ca. 1.5 m higher than that of Cave 100; ca. 2.2 m to the south-west of Cave 102, floor ca. 1.5 m lower than that of Cave 102 (fig. ).

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, standard size.

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Fairly good.

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, direction 114˚; ca. 2.2 m to the north-east of Cave 101, floor ca. 1.5 m higher than that of Cave 101 (fig. ); ca. 9.2 m to the south-west of Cave 103, floor ca. 1 m lower than that of Cave 103.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, standard size (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Fairly good.

figure.head: 100號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 100, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, direction 112˚; ca. 9.2 m to the north-east of Cave 102, floor ca. 1 m higher than that of Cave 102; ca. 2.1 m to the south-west of Cave 104, at the same level with Cave 104.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Fairly good.

figure.head: 103號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 103, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, direction 115˚; ca. 2.1 m to the north-east of Cave 103, ca. 2 m to the south-west of Cave 104-1, at the same level with both Caves 103 and 104-1 (fig. ).

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Upper part of the entrance damaged.

div.head: Location
Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, collapsed entrance (fig. ).

list.item: Rest of the entrance opening: ca. 225 × 187 cm.

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Upper part of the cave collapsed.

div.head: Location
Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, half of which is collapsed (fig. ).

list.item: Rest of the entrance opening: ca. 180 × 190 cm.

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Front half of cave collapsed.

figure.head: 104號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 104, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, direction 122˚; at the same level with Cave 104-2 ca. 0.7 m to the south-west, with which a double-cave is formed; ca. 2.85 m to the south-west of Cave 105, floor ca. 0.46 m higher than that of Cave 105.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, half of which is collapsed (fig. ).

list.item: Rest of the entrance opening: ca. 186 × 180 cm.

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Front half of cave collapsed.

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, direction 128˚; ca. 2.85 m to the south-west Cave 104-3, floor ca. 0.46 m lower than that of Cave 104-3; ca. 47.5 m to the north-east Cave 106, floor ca. 2 m lower than that of Cave 106; separated by a huge rock without direct access.

div.head: Shape
div.p: A cave in shape of square box with open front, standard size is originally planned; abandoned after the bottom is finished (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Unfinished.

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, isolated; ca. 50 m to the south-west Cave 105, floor ca. 2 m higher than that of Cave 105; separated by a huge rock; accessible through a path 5 m away from the juncture that bypasses the rock (fig. ) at the same level with Cave 106-1 ca. 2 m to the north-east.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, small size (fig. ).

list.item: Width of the rear wall: 150 cm at top, 180 cm at bottom.

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Entrance slightly damaged.

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H; ca. 2 m north-east of Cave 106. The floor is at the same level with that of Cave 106; 39.2 m to the south-west of Cave 107.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Irregular shape; carved for the first time, abandoned probably due to the poor quality of the rock (fig. ).

list.item: Rest of the entrance opening: ca. 87 × 164 cm.

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Unfinished.

figure.head: 106號窟爲小型窟。2024年拍攝
Cave 106, small size; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, in the area called Dingjiayan 丁家岩; direction 145˚; 39.2 m to the north-east of Cave 106-1; 1.65 m to the south-west of Cave 108; floor ca. 0.5 m higher than that of Cave 108. Ca. 5.7 m above the foot of the cliff, and ca. 13 m above the water level (fig. and fig. ); ca. 270 m away from landing place of boat (fig. ).

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, standard size; rough striations, but no polishing.

list.item: Wall f: width 170 cm (front part broken off).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Entrance damaged.

div.head: Location
Shape
div.p: Square box with open front; rough striations, but not polished (fig. ).

list.item: Wall d: width 139 cm (front part broken off).
Wall f: width 146 cm (front part broken off).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Deep cracks in walls d and f have caused a crescent-shaped piece of the front part of the floor to break off.

figure.head: 108號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 108, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, in the area called Dingjiayan. Direction 145˚. Ca. 7.25 m north-east of sutra Cave 110 (fig. ); ca. 1.5 m south-west of Cave 112, the floor is about 1.7 m lower than that of Cave 112. Closely located to two further caves, Caves 112 and 113, these three caves build together a set of triple caves (fig. ). Ca. 1.5 m above the foot of the cliff, and ca. 13 m above the water level.

div.head: Shape
State of Preservation
div.p: Fairly good.

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, in the area called Dingjiayan. Direction 145˚. Ca. 1.5 m north-east of Cave 111, the middle one of the triple Caves 111−113 (fig. ). The floor is about 1.7 m higher than that of Cave 111. Floor ca. 2 m above the foot of the cliff and ca. 14 m above water level.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front; Double reveal. Walls with ca. 2 cm wide striations, but not polished.

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Fairly good.

figure.head: 113號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 113, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, in the area called Dingjiayan; direction 145˚; ca. 2 m north-east of Cave 112, the northmost one of the triple Caves 111−113 (fig. ); floor ca. 1.4 m below Cave 112; ca. 1.3 m above the foot of the cliff, and ca. 12 m above the water level; ca. 34.7 m south-west of Cave 114.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Square box with open front, traces of double entrance frame, standard size. Walls with ca. 2 cm wide striations, but not polished (fig. and fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Fairly good.

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, in the area called Dingjiayan (fig. ), direction: 145°; Far away from other caves, ca. 34.7 m of Cave 113 to the south-west and ca. 42.80 m to Cave 115 to the north-east.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Double entrance frame; outer frame rectangular, inner frame above half circle (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Niche with the roughcasts of two unfinished sculptures (fig. ).

div.head: Location
Shape
div.p: Trapezoid ground plan; ceiling lower in the rear, the corrugated structure imitating roof tiles visible (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Front of the ceiling broken off; rough striations on wall e and the rear parts of walls d and f; finer scraping on the front parts of walls d and f, but not polished. A polished field of script 55 × 47 cm, on the western wall outside the cave, prepared for inscription (fig. ).

figure.head: 遠望115號窟。2010年拍攝
Cave 115 from afar; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, direction 160°; ca. 22 m to the north-east of Cave 115, the floor is about 5 m higher than that of Cave 115; ca. 29.3 m to the south-west of Cave 116, the floor is about 8 m higher than that of Cave 116; a polished field outside the cave on the west, probably for an inscription (fig. ). The number of this cave is first given in 2024.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Box-shaped with open front (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Wall d and its celling are destroyed by quarrying (fig. ).

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, in the area called Pusayan 菩薩岩, direction 167˚; ca. 29.3 m to the north-east of Cave 115-1, the floor is about 8 m lower than that of Cave 115-1; ca. 0.80 m to the south-west of Cave 117, the floor is about 1.2 m lower than that of Cave 117. Closely located to two further caves, Caves 117 and 118, these three caves build together a set of triple caves (fig. ).

div.head: Shape
div.p: Box-shaped with open front, standard size, double entrance frame (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Probably intended for sutras, but no trace of sutra is to find on all three walls, instead sculptures were later carved. On wall e are three Buddhas, on wall f is a pagoda in relief, 116-3 (fig. ), and on wall d are a niche with a round arch as well as a colophon of 1132 (116-2, fig. ); transcription and translation see above, p. .

figure.head: 116號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 116, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, in the area called Pusayan, direction 175˚; ca. 0.8 m to the north-east of Cave 116, the floor is ca. 1.2 m higher than that of Cave 116; ca. 0.54 m to the south-west of Cave 118, the floor is ca. 1.2 m higher than that of Cave 118; the middle one of the triple Caves 116−118 (fig. ).

div.head: Shape
div.p: Box-shaped with open front, half standard size, double entrance frame.
Square ground plan; flat ceiling lower in the rear (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Rough striations and moss on all walls.

figure.head: 117號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 117, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, in the area called Pusayan, direction 167˚; 0.54 m north-east of Cave 117, the floor is ca. 1.2 m lower than Cave 117; 4 m south-west of Cave 119, the floor is ca. 1.3 m lower than Cave 119; the northmost one of the triple Caves 116－118 (fig. ); ca. 3 m above water level.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Box-shaped, open at the front, standard size, traces of double entrance frame in the west, flat ceiling (fig. ).

list.item: Wall e: width at top 230 cm, at bottom 256 cm, hight 168–175 cm.

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Wall e later sculptures of twin bodhisattvas, fragmented (fig. ); polished field of script for dedicatory inscriptions, but nothing discernible today.

figure.head: 116－118號窟的位置關係。2024年拍攝
Spatial relation of Caves 116–118; photograph taken in 2024
118號窟的雙菩薩立像殘迹。2024年拍攝
Cave 118, twin standing bodhisattvas, fragmented; photograph taken in 2024

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, in the area called Pusayan, direction 175˚; ca. 4 m north-east of Cave 118, the floor is ca. 1.3 m higher than Cave 118 (fig. ); ca. 2 m south-west of Cave 120, the floor is ca. 1.5 m higher than Cave 120; 4.3 m above water level (fig. ).

div.head: Shape
div.p: Box-shaped, open at the front, standard size, double entrance frame on the east.

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Front broken off; shrine in wall e; three tier altar with a group of Buddhist (west) and Daoist (east) sculptures (fig. ); a burial niche, a lamp niche and a colophon in wall d (fig. and fig. ).

figure.head: 119號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 119, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, in the area called Pusayan, direction of wall d 192˚; ca. 2 m to the north-east of Cave 119, the floor is ca. 1.5 m lower than Cave 119; ca. 0.8 m to the south-west of Cave 121, the floor is ca. 0.3 m lower than Cave 121 (fig. ); 3 m above water level.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Box-shaped, open at the front, double entrance frame no longer visible.

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Wall d damaged, front part of wall f broken off; wall e rather well preserved with regular striations.

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, in the area called Pusayan, direction 195˚; ca. 0.8 m to the north-east of Cave 120, the floor is ca. 0.3 m higher than Cave 120; ca. 0.9 m to the south-west of Cave 122, the floor is ca. 0.4 m lower than Cave 122 (fig. ).

div.head: Shape
div.p: Box shape with open front, standard size (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Unfinished.

div.head: Location
div.p: Section H, in the area called Pusayan, direction 195˚; ca. 0.9 m to the north-east of Cave 121, the floor is ca. 0.4 m higher than Cave 121; the last cave of the Grove.

div.head: Shape
div.p: Box-shaped with open front, small size; double entrance frame, ceiling descending towards the rear (fig. ).

div.head: State of Preservation
div.p: Not finished; floor largely broken off; rough striations on three walls.

figure.head: 121號窟近景。2010年拍攝
Cave 121, close-up view; photograph taken in 2010
